Core.DisableExcludes TYPE: bool DEFAULT: false VERSION: 4.5.0 --DESCRIPTION-- <p> This directive disables SGML-style exclusions, e.g. the exclusion of <code>&lt;object&gt;</code> in any descendant of a <code>&lt;pre&gt;</code> tag. Disabling excludes will allow some invalid documents to pass through HTML Purifier, but HTML Purifier will also be less likely to accidentally remove large documents during processing. </p> --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
